description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a before_script running npm install and a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME that stores node_modules/ with untracked files. Add a test:node10 job in the default test stage using the node:10 Docker image that runs npm run lint then npm test. Add a test:node4 job in the test stage using the node:4 image that runs npm run lint then npm test. Add a test:node6 job in the test stage using the node:6 image that runs npm run lint then npm test. Add a test:node8 job in the test stage using the node:8 image that runs npm run lint then npm test.
